samples.xml_description:
<module id="accu">
    <description>Accumulate 4 input data and output the result.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data for addition.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating readiness for new data.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating when 4 input data accumulation is reached.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[9:0]">10-bit output data representing the accumulated sum.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="state" width_description="[1:0]">
            <enum-value>0</enum-value>
            <enum-value>1</enum-value>
            <enum-value>2</enum-value>
            <enum-value>3</enum-value>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="accu_state" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[1:0]">Accumulator state.</reg>
        <reg id="data_count" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[2:0]">Count of input data.</reg>
        <reg id="sum" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[9:0]">Accumulated sum.</reg>
        <reg id="valid_out" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[0:0]">Valid output flag.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <case>
            <case-item id="state">
                <case-item-value>0</case-item-value>
                <if condition="'data_count == 3'b100'">
                    <then>
                        <assign id="accu_state" value="1" />
                        <assign id="sum" value="'data_in + sum'"/>
                        <assign id="data_count" value="'data_count + 1'"/>
                        <assign id="valid_out" value="1" />
                    </then>
                    <else>
                        <assign id="accu_state" value="0" />
                        <assign id="sum" value="0" />
                        <assign id="data_count" value="0" />
                        <assign id="valid_out" value="0" />
                    </else>
                </if>
                <else-if condition="'data_count == 3'b011'">
                    <then>
                        <assign id="accu_state" value="2" />
                        <assign id="sum" value="'data_in + sum'"/>
                        <assign id="data_count" value="'data_count + 1'"/>
                        <assign id="valid_out" value="1" />
                    </then>
                </else-if>
                <else-if condition="'data_count == 3'b10'">
                    <then>
                        <assign id="accu_state" value="3" />
                        <assign id="sum" value="'data_in + sum'"/>
                        <assign id="data_count" value="'data_count + 1'"/>
                        <assign id="valid_out" value="1" />
                    </then>
                </else-if>
                <else-if condition="'data_count == 3'b11'">
                    <then>
                        <assign id="accu_state" value="0" />
                        <assign id="sum" value="0" />
                        <assign id="data_count" value="0" />
                        <assign id="valid_out" value="0" />
                    </then>
                </else-if>
            </case-item>
            <case-item-value>1</case-item-value>
            <if condition="'data_count == 3'b100'">
                <then>
                    <assign id="accu_state" value="2" />
                    <assign id="sum" value="'data_in + sum'"/>
                    <assign id="data_count" value="'data_count + 1'"/>
                    <assign id="valid_out" value="1" />
                </then>
                <else>
                    <assign id="accu_state" value="1" />
                    <assign id="sum" value="0" />
                    <assign id="data_count" value="0" />
                    <assign id="valid_out" value="0" />
                </else>
            </if>
            <case-item-value>2</case-item-value>
            <if condition="'data_count == 3'b101'">
                <then>
                    <assign id="accu_state" value="3" />
                    <assign id="sum" value="'data_in + sum'"/>
                    <assign id="data_count" value="'data_count + 1'"/>
                    <assign id="valid_out" value="1" />
                </then>
                <else>
                    <assign id="accu_state" value="2" />
                    <assign id="sum" value="0" />
                    <assign id="data_count" value="0" />
                    <assign id="valid_out" value="0" />
                </else>
            </if>
            <case-item-value>3</case-item-value>
            <if condition="'data_count == 3'b110'">
                <then>
                    <assign id="accu_state" value="0" />
                    <assign id="sum" value="'data_in + sum'"/>
                    <assign id="data_count" value="'data_count + 1'"/>
                    <assign id="valid_out" value="1" />
                </then>
                <else>
                    <assign id="accu_state" value="3" />
                    <assign id="sum" value="0" />
                    <assign id="data_count" value="0" />
                    <assign id="valid_out" value="0" />
                </else>
            </case-item>
        </case>
    </implementation>
</module>
